description: Code exists for 3 slices (pendingwithdrawallookup, accountbalancereadmodel, withdrawfunds) but no implementation-hashes.json exists. Tests the 'unverified implementation' path in Pass 4: verify code against spec, stamp hash if it matches, block if it doesn't.
assertions: verify-stamp-review: pendingwithdrawallookup has code, no hash, code matches spec → verified, hash stamped, stays Review
verify-stamp-review: accountbalancereadmodel has code, no hash, code matches spec (via message chain) → verified, hash stamped, stays Review
verify-fail-blocked: withdrawfunds has code, no hash, code DOES NOT match spec (FundsWithdrawnFromAccount missing) → Blocked, hash NOT stamped
hashes-created: implementation-hashes.json is created with hashes for verified slices but NOT for blocked ones

expected_actions.reason: Code exists but does not match spec — internal event FundsWithdrawnFromAccount missing from stream factory
